hero.body: Abyride is non‑emergency medical transport, wheelchair‑accessible vans, airport pickups, and everyday rides — under one roof. Dispatched 24/7, billed direct to most insurers, driven by people trained for the moments that matter.
widget.title: Where are we taking you?
partners.label: Contracted & trusted by Michigan's health network
services.h2_1: Most ride apps optimize for the
services.s01.title: Non‑Emergency Medical
services.s01.tag: On time, on rhythm, on the same schedule every week.
services.s01.body: Dialysis, oncology, rehab. We coordinate directly with your case manager and bill MDHHS / Medicaid / Molina / Meridian — no paperwork on your end.
services.s02.title: Wheelchair‑Accessible Vans
services.s02.body: Side & rear ramps, dual‑position lifts, four‑point securement. Every driver is trained in safe transfer technique and re‑certified annually.
services.s03.title: Airport Pickup
services.s03.tag: Flight‑tracked rides to DTW, GRR & FNT.
services.s03.body: Meet‑and‑greet at baggage claim. Multilingual drivers on request. Flat fares quoted at booking — no surge, no surprises if your flight is late.
services.s04.title: Live Language Translation
services.s04.tag: A driver who speaks your language.
services.s04.body: In‑car interpretation in Amharic, Arabic, Spanish, French, ASL and nine more. On‑demand video interpreter for any other language, billable to medical plans.
services.s05.title: Everyday Rides
services.s05.body: Flat‑rate pricing across Detroit, Ann Arbor, Lansing, Flint, Grand Rapids and Dearborn. No surge. Pay through the app or in cash with the driver.
why.body: The boring stuff done right — safety, language, healthcare, family. We don't dress it up because we don't need to.
why.01_body: Background‑checked drivers, GPS on every trip, in‑app emergency line direct to dispatch.
why.02_body: Interpreters in 14 languages — Amharic, Arabic, French, Spanish, ASL and more.
why.03_body: Direct insurance billing. Trained medical transport. Wheelchair‑accessible fleet.
why.04_body: Book on behalf of a parent. Share the ride. Get pickup & drop‑off notifications.
app.body: Book a ride, track your driver, replay any past trip, message in your language, or share your live location with a family member. The app does what we used to need six phone calls to do.
app.feat_a_desc: One‑tap pickup or schedule weeks ahead.
app.feat_b_desc: Live ETA · driver photo · plate number.
app.feat_c_desc: Send live trip link to family.
app.feat_d_desc: Re‑book recurring trips in two taps.
app.feat_e_desc: Call, chat, or video — your language.
news.h2: The new Abyride app is now live on iOS & Android.
news.body: Rebuilt from the ground up — faster booking, live driver tracking, in‑app translation, recurring trips, and direct insurance billing. Free download, no account required to browse.
success.s01.label: Happy clients
success.s01.desc: Riders and family bookers across MI.
success.s02.label: On‑time rate
success.s02.desc: Measured at the pickup curb, YTD.
success.s03.label: Live dispatch
success.s04.label: Years on the road
success.quote: Reliable, on time, and the drivers treat my mother like family. After eight years of dialysis rides, I don't think about transport anymore. That's the highest praise I can give.
testimonials.featured_quote: Incredibly reliable, especially for medical timing. The driver was punctual and professional — exactly what I needed for my early morning pickups.
testimonials.t1.name: Steve H.
testimonials.t1.quote: Outstanding driving service when I needed it most. Professional, on time, and great conversation. Clean, spacious ride when other apps had failed me.
testimonials.t2.name: Ben R.
testimonials.t2.quote: This is how taxi service should be. Door‑to‑door conversation, the courteous approach, the option to share with the driver with superior service.

blog.p3.title: Breaking language barriers: the role of our translation service

driver.body: Recurring medical routes, no surge volatility, and a dispatch team that actually picks up. Average driver earns $1,240/wk. Bring your own vehicle or join the accessible fleet.
driver.disclaimer: Application takes ~10 minutes. Driving record & insurance required.

svc.page_sub: From dialysis runs to airport pickups, every ride is built around the person taking it.
svc.s01.desc_long: Abyride's non-emergency medical transport is built for patients who need consistency — dialysis three times a week, weekly oncology infusions, or daily rehab sessions. We coordinate directly with your case manager, confirm every appointment, and bill MDHHS, Medicaid, Molina, and Meridian on your behalf so you never touch a form.
svc.s01.feat1_desc: We bill MDHHS, Medicaid, Molina, and Meridian directly. No out-of-pocket surprises.
svc.s01.feat2_desc: We work with your care team to confirm appointments and adjust schedules when plans change.
svc.s01.feat3_desc: Set your weekly route once. We show up every time, same driver when possible.
svc.s01.feat4_desc: Every driver is certified in passenger assistance and first-aid ready.
svc.s01.break_quote: The ride to treatment shouldn't be the hardest part of treatment.
svc.s01.break_sub: We handle the logistics so patients can focus on getting better.
svc.s02.desc_long: Our fleet of 68 ADA-compliant vans is purpose-built for riders who use wheelchairs, power chairs, or mobility scooters. Side and rear ramps, dual-position lifts, and four-point securement systems mean every passenger travels safely and comfortably. Drivers are trained in safe transfer technique and re-certified every year.
svc.s02.feat1_desc: Multiple entry options for manual and power wheelchairs of all sizes.
svc.s02.feat2_desc: Hydraulic lifts rated for heavy-duty power chairs and scooters.
svc.s02.feat3_desc: Industry-standard tie-down systems keep every chair locked in place.
svc.s02.feat4_desc: Every driver renews their accessible transport certification each year.
svc.s02.break_quote: Mobility shouldn't stop at the front door.
svc.s02.break_sub: Our accessible fleet is ready in six Michigan cities, every day of the year.
svc.s03.desc_long: We serve Detroit Metro (DTW), Gerald R. Ford (GRR), Bishop International (FNT), and Lansing Capital (LAN) with flat fares quoted at booking — no surge pricing, no waiting-time penalties if your flight lands late. Drivers monitor your flight in real time and adjust arrival accordingly.
svc.s03.feat1_desc: Your driver monitors your flight live and adjusts pickup time automatically.
svc.s03.feat2_desc: The price you see at booking is the price you pay — no surge, no hidden fees.
svc.s03.feat3_desc: Driver meets you at baggage claim with a name sign, no hunting required.
svc.s03.feat4_desc: Request a driver who speaks your language when you book.
svc.s03.break_quote: Your flight landed. Your driver already knows.
svc.s03.break_sub: Live flight tracking means we're there when you are — not a minute before, not a minute after.
svc.s04.desc_long: Abyride is the only Michigan ride service with in-car interpretation built into the booking flow. Choose a driver who speaks your language — Amharic, Arabic, Spanish, French, ASL, Somali, and eight more — or request an on-demand video interpreter for any language not on the list. Interpretation fees are billable to most medical plans.
svc.s04.feat1_desc: Amharic, Arabic, Spanish, French, ASL, Somali, Kinyarwanda, and more.
svc.s04.feat2_desc: Your driver speaks your language — no phone relay, no delay.
svc.s04.feat3_desc: For any language not on our driver roster, a certified video interpreter joins the ride.
svc.s04.feat4_desc: Interpretation services are billable to most Michigan medical plans.
svc.s04.break_quote: A ride where you understand everything — and everyone understands you.
svc.s04.break_sub: Language should never be a barrier to getting the care you need.
svc.s05.desc_long: Whether you're commuting to work in Detroit, running errands in Ann Arbor, or getting the kids to school in Grand Rapids, Abyride's everyday rides offer flat-rate pricing with no surprises. We cover Detroit, Ann Arbor, Lansing, Flint, Grand Rapids, and Dearborn — pay through the app or in cash with your driver.
svc.s05.feat1_desc: Know your fare before you book. No surge, no hidden fees, ever.
svc.s05.feat2_desc: Detroit, Ann Arbor, Lansing, Flint, Grand Rapids, and Dearborn.
svc.s05.feat3_desc: Pay through the app with a card or in cash directly with your driver.
svc.s05.feat4_desc: Book rides for family members and get real-time pickup notifications.
svc.s05.break_quote: Getting around shouldn't cost more on a bad day.
svc.s05.break_sub: Flat-rate fares mean the price is the same whether it's rush hour or a rainy Tuesday.
about.page_sub: Abyride started with one van, one family, and one belief — that getting to your appointment should never be the reason you miss it.
about.origin_h2: One van. One family. One promise.
about.origin_body1: Abyride was founded in Detroit in 2014 by the Abdi family after watching a neighbor miss a dialysis appointment because no ride showed up. That single moment became the company's founding principle: reliable medical transport isn't a luxury — it's healthcare.
about.origin_body2: We started with a single wheelchair-accessible van and a phone number. Eleven years later, we operate 68 vehicles across six Michigan cities, employ over 120 drivers, and complete more than 3,200 medical trips every month.
about.mission_body: Our mission is simple: remove every barrier between a person and the care they need. That means showing up on time, speaking your language, accepting your insurance, and treating every rider with the dignity they deserve.
about.values_body: These aren't marketing words. They're the criteria we use to hire drivers, build features, and decide which contracts to take.
about.val1_body: A missed ride is a missed appointment. We treat every pickup like it's the only one that matters — because for that rider, it is.
about.val2_body: Every rider is treated with respect, patience, and care. No exceptions for language, ability, or insurance status.
about.val3_body: Flat fares, direct billing, no hidden fees. You know the price before you book and you never touch a form.
about.val4_body: We hire locally, partner with Michigan health networks, and reinvest in the communities we serve.
about.team_body: From our dispatchers who answer in under 90 seconds to our drivers who learn your name by the second ride — Abyride is built on people who take the work seriously.
about.team_m1_bio: Started Abyride with a single van in 2014. Still answers dispatch calls on weekends.
about.team_m2_bio: Oversees operations, driver training, and every insurance partnership in the network.
about.team_m3_bio: Built the dispatch system from scratch. Manages a team of 18 coordinators across three shifts.
about.team_m4_bio: Led the rebuild of the Abyride app. Previously at Ford Mobility and Lyft.
about.tl1_body: One van, one driver, one wheelchair-accessible route between Dearborn and Henry Ford Hospital.
about.tl2_body: Awarded our first state Medicaid transport contract, covering dialysis routes across Wayne County.
about.tl3_body: Expanded to Ann Arbor and Lansing. Added multilingual dispatch in Arabic and Amharic.
about.tl4_body: Designated an essential medical transport provider during COVID-19. Completed 1,800+ trips per month at peak.
about.tl5_body: Launched in-car interpretation in 14 languages — the first Michigan ride service to offer this at booking.
about.tl6_body: Rebuilt the Abyride app from the ground up. Fleet grew to 68 ADA-certified vehicles across six cities.
about.partners_h2: The networks that rely on us.
about.partners_body: We hold active contracts with Michigan's largest health networks and insurers. Every partnership is built on performance — on-time rates, billing accuracy, and rider satisfaction.
contact.page_sub: Dispatch answers 24/7. For bookings, billing questions, driver applications, or anything else — reach us the way that works for you.
contact.dispatch_body: Our dispatch team answers in under 90 seconds, around the clock. For urgent ride requests, medical transport coordination, or same-day bookings — the phone is always the fastest path.
contact.channels_eyebrow: II · Other ways to reach us
contact.ch1_desc: Schedule a ride, set up recurring medical transport, or manage your account through the app or web portal.
contact.ch2_desc: For billing questions, insurance coordination, driver applications, or general inquiries. We respond within one business day.
contact.ch3_desc: Interested in driving with Abyride? Applications take about 10 minutes. Driving record and insurance required.
contact.ch4_desc: Media inquiries, partnership proposals, and MDHHS contract questions go to our operations team.
contact.form_h2: Not a phone person? That's fine.
contact.form_body: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within one business day. For urgent ride needs, please call dispatch directly.
contact.form_note: We respond within one business day. For urgent needs, call (833) 829-7339.
contact.offices_body: Our main office is in Detroit. We operate in six Michigan cities with local dispatch coordinators in each.
contact.faq1_q: How do I book a medical transport ride?
contact.faq1_a: Call (833) 829-7339 or use the Abyride app. For recurring medical routes, we can set up a standing schedule with one call.
contact.faq2_a: Yes. We bill MDHHS, Medicaid, Molina, and Meridian directly. You never need to submit a claim or pay out of pocket for covered rides.
contact.faq3_a: Our dispatch team speaks English, Arabic, Amharic, French, and Spanish. For other languages, we can connect you with an interpreter.
contact.faq4_q: How do I apply to drive for Abyride?
contact.faq4_a: Visit our driver application page or call dispatch. The application takes about 10 minutes. You'll need a clean driving record and valid insurance.
contact.faq5_a: Detroit, Dearborn, Ann Arbor, Lansing, Flint, and Grand Rapids. We serve all of Wayne, Washtenaw, Ingham, Genesee, and Kent counties.
